claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a source fix, causal compiler explanation, general numerical theorem, cross-platform determinism, hardware relevance, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: R160's rejected rows remain rejected by a source-faithful rational oracle, while every R160 rejected row is consistent with the reconstructed source-order binary64 minimum; this is a numerical diagnostic, not a repair

requirements.label: R160 result and all worker payloads validate
source transform and lineage binding are explicit
all 5040 mappings are enumerated per profile/case
rational and source-order binary64 models are retained
every selected vector is classified against both models
R160 exact failures remain visible under the source-faithful oracle
every R160 exact failure is a source-order f64 minimum
no source patch, execution, shots, or route change is used

summary.source_fold: binary64 multiply and left-to-right binary64 addition over source-order nodes then edges

title: B4/B8 R161 source-faithful VF2 score audit
